chargingFaq.q: How long does AC charging take on a 7.4 kW home/work charger?
chargingFaq.a: Indicative full charge (0–100%) around 7.2 hours at 7.4 kW AC — actual time depends on SoC window, ambient temperature, and onboard charger limits.

chargingFaq.q: Is this suitable for apartment buyers?
chargingFaq.a: With overnight AC charging, many city buyers cover daily use well below the 320 km ARAI claim — confirm society charger permissions before purchase.

dailyOfficeCommute.explanation: Well suited for office commutes when daily distance fits a 218–262 km real-world city band.

familyWeekendTrips.explanation: Practical for family weekend trips within its range band with planned stops.
familyWeekendTrips.tradeoffSummary: Packed highway weekends need charging discipline — not a petrol-style fill-and-go rhythm.

budgetOwnership.explanation: Better aligned with value-focused buyers at this ex-showroom band (EVSavari value score 85/100).
budgetOwnership.tradeoffSummary: Lower upfront price trims may trade range, features, or highway comfort versus rivals.

highwayConfidence.explanation: Highway planning band roughly 166–218 km — road-trip confidence rated low.
highwayConfidence.tradeoffSummary: Frequent high-speed touring without charging planning is less suitable.

firstTimeEVOwnership.explanation: Practical for first-time EV buyers who accept a learning curve on charging habits.
firstTimeEVOwnership.tradeoffSummary: Buyers wanting zero lifestyle change on long routes should cross-shop longer-range options.

editorialNarratives.ownership: Ownership on citroen EVs is generally practical for Indian buyers who value predictable service intervals and an 8-year battery warranty narrative. Resale confidence is modeled at 70/100 — interpret as editorial guidance, not a guarantee.
editorialNarratives.charging: Home or workplace AC charging at 7.4 kW is well suited for overnight top-ups; against a certified 320 km ARAI figure.
editorialNarratives.familySuitability: Family suitability scores 68/100 in our model — better aligned with couples or compact-family needs; boot space around 315 L should be checked against your stroller or luggage routine.
editorialNarratives.firstTimeEv: First-time EV friendliness is rated 80/100 with anxiety-reduction at 66/100. This variant is practical for buyers who want clear warranty terms and manageable charging habits — less ideal if you expect zero planning on long routes.
editorialNarratives.compare: In the hatchback set on EVSavari, this variant is better aligned with buyers who prioritise distinctive design; trade-off: no dc fast charging.
